parameters.sqlQuery:
WITH configured_fees AS (
  SELECT
    account_id,
    account_name,
    subscription_name,
    plan_name,
    plan_value AS configured_fee,
    charge_model
  FROM `guesty-data.zuora_analytics.product_catalog`
  WHERE LOWER(plan_name) LIKE '%payment gateway%'
    AND effective_end_date > CURRENT_DATE()
),

invoiced_fees AS (
  SELECT
    mongo_account_id,
    subscription_name,
    product_name,
    SUM(amount) AS total_invoiced
  FROM `guesty-data.zuora_analytics.invoice_items`
  WHERE LOWER(product_name) LIKE '%payment gateway%'
    AND CAST(invoice_item_created_at AS TIMESTAMP) >= TIMESTAMP_SUB(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(), INTERVAL 30 DAY)
  GROUP BY mongo_account_id, subscription_name, product_name
)

SELECT
  cf.account_name,
  cf.account_id,
  cf.plan_name,
  cf.charge_model,
  cf.configured_fee,
  ROUND(inv.total_invoiced, 2) AS total_invoiced,
  ROUND(inv.total_invoiced - cf.configured_fee, 2) AS delta
FROM configured_fees cf
JOIN invoiced_fees inv
  ON cf.account_id = inv.mongo_account_id
  AND cf.subscription_name = inv.subscription_name
WHERE inv.total_invoiced != cf.configured_fee
ORDER BY ABS(inv.total_invoiced - cf.configured_fee) DESC
LIMIT 50
